prompt:
Ultra-soft glamour portrait of a beautiful young woman with warm auburn-red hair styled in a loose low bun, featuring delicate face-framing strands cascading across one side of her face. Elegant side-profile pose with eyes gently lowered and lips slightly parted, creating a dreamy, romantic expression. Large ornate gold statement earrings and a delicate gold necklace add a luxurious touch. Soft luminous skin with natural makeup, glowing highlighter on the cheekbones, rosy blush, and muted rose-red lips.
Shot with a shallow depth of field and intentional soft-focus effect, creating a creamy, ethereal atmosphere. Warm golden lighting wraps around the face, producing subtle highlights and gentle shadows. Minimal neutral background with smooth bokeh. off-shoulder white outfit exposing the shoulders and collarbone, enhancing the elegant fashion-editorial aesthetic. High-end beauty photography, cinematic glow, dreamy lens blur, feminine luxury, soft romantic mood, photorealistic, premium magazine-style portrait, vertical composition, 3:4 aspect ratio.
